title: Pokemusic-Enviroment COBBLEMON and PIXELMON Music Pack
description: The best music pack for COBBLEMON and PIXELMON with over 230 music tracks from original Pokemon games.
body:
# [**_REACTIVE MUSIC REQUIRED_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music) and its dependency [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

The ultimate music pack for Cobblemon.

Made to make your adventure truly feel like a Pokémon game.

Every biome, every dimension, and every important moment has its own music.

No random songs. Just music that complements what you're experiencing.

If you play Cobblemon, this is the soundtrack your world deserves ;)

> 🛠️ Technical Details
> 
> - Uses Reactive Music event system
> - Optimized for performance
> - No replacement of vanilla sound files
> - Fully modular configuration

<details>
<summary>📥 How to Install</summary>

1. Install [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions) (requires [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl))

2. Place this pack inside your `resourcepacks` folder.
   
3. **Enable it and place it at the top** (This will mute all Minecraft background music)
   
4. Open Reactive Music settings via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or use `/reactivemusic` in your world.

5. Select this music pack from the list.

6. Enjoy your Pokémon-style adventure ✨

</details>
